infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Be to use your camera to scan meals and barcodes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Be to use your location while you record outdoor training and search for nearby races.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Be to use your microphone for voice meal logging.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Be to convert your speech into meal logs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Be to choose photos for nutrition logging and your profile.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Be to use your camera to scan meals and barcodes.
